# Simple test showing the callgraph gap

# Create a test that calls mcpdiff
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# Run callgraph on a specific binary
exec sh -c 'printf "package main\\nimport \"os/exec\"\\nfunc main() {\\n    exec.Command(\"mcpdiff\").Run()\\n}\\n" > runner.go'
exec go build -o runner runner.go

# Analyze with callgraph
# Analyze with callgraph
exec sh -c 'callgraph -algo static runner.go > callgraph.txt'

# Look for mcpdiff's main - won't find it
! exec grep 'mcpdiff.*main' callgraph.txt

# Can find exec.Command (how we run programs)
exec grep 'exec\.Command' callgraph.txt
stdout 'Command'

# But no connection to mcpdiff specifically
! exec grep -i 'mcpdiff' callgraph.txt
